relationship.improvement_proposal: Replay-visible proposed change derived from evaluation evidence.
relationship.improvement_review: Replay-visible assessment of the improvement proposal.
relationship.improvement_approval: Future explicit human-authorized governance decision required before implementation.
relationship.implementation: Future governed execution path allowed only after approval.

constitutional_invariant.llm_proposes: Provider assistance may contribute review text but remains non-authoritative.
constitutional_invariant.aigol_governs: AiGOL owns formal improvement review artifact creation and validation.
constitutional_invariant.worker_executes: Worker output remains upstream evidence, not review or approval authority.
constitutional_invariant.replay_records: Improvement review evidence must be append-only and reconstructable.

known_limits: Improvement Review Runtime is not implemented.
Improvement Approval Runtime is not implemented.
Review does not approve, reject, implement, mutate, or self-apply changes.
